channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ombudsman dismisses misconduct complaints vs Benitez, cites lack of evidence
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has dismissed the complaints for grave misconduct filed against Bacolod City Lone District Representative Alfredo Abelardo Benitez and several city officials, citing lack o...

item.title: Navigating Change and Certainty in Life: A Reflection on Spencer Johnson's 'Who Moved My Cheese?'
item.description: In this reflective piece, Jane Shussa draws from Spencer Johnson's famous book, 'Who Moved My Cheese?', to explore the concept of certainty and safety in life. The book presents four characters—two mi...

item.title: Ontario Provincial Police officer dies in Cobourg motorcycle crash, Highway 401 temporarily closed
item.description: Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) have confirmed the death of an officer involved in a motorcycle collision in Cobourg, Ontario. The incident occurred on Highway 401, which prompted authorities to close...

item.title: Judicial Commission Meeting Sparks Debate on IHC Judges’ Proposed Transfers
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) is currently experiencing significant uncertainty over the proposed transfers of five of its judges, which has drawn attention in court proceedings. During a ...

item.title: How Mopane Worm and Termite Trade Supports Rural Livelihoods in Limpopo
item.description: In Limpopo province, one of South Africa's poorest regions, local communities are turning to the harvesting and sale of mopane worms and termite alates as a key source of income and nutrition. These i...

item.title: Man Arrested for Allegedly Attempting to Shoot Trump at WHCA Dinner
item.description: One man wey dem identify as Cole Allen, 31 years old from California, don face charge for court after him try fire gun during White House Correspondents Association (WHCA) dinner wey Donald Trump atte...

item.title: India and New Zealand Sign Significant Free Trade Agreement, Says PM Modi
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has highlighted the signing of the Free Trade Agreement (FTA) between India and New Zealand as a historic step in strengthening bilateral ties. The FTA is expected to faci...

item.title: First Case of Suicide Linked to Domestic Abuse Among Under-18s Revealed in Police Report
item.description: A new police report has revealed the tragic first case of suicide linked to domestic abuse involving individuals under the age of 18. The incident marks a grim milestone in the fight against domestic ...

item.title: APC Announces Updated 2027 Election Schedule And Form Fees
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don release new timetable for their activities ahead of the 2027 general elections. The party talk say make una dey ready for screening, primaries, and appeals as d...

item.title: How Researchers Developed Uniform Grass for the 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, spanning 16 stadiums across Canada, the United States, and Mexico, presents unprecedented challenges for turfgrass researchers. With matches across diverse climates and venues...

item.title: Delhi HC closes Bina Modi case after son withdraws complaint
item.description: The Delhi High Court on Monday formally concluded the criminal proceedings against Bina Modi, the CMD of Godfrey Phillips India, along with her personal security guard, Surendra Prasad, and senior law...

item.title: Quebec Premier's First Official Visit to Washington Focuses on Trade Talks
item.description: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette met with Jamieson Greer, the U.S. Trade Representative, in Washington D.C. on April 27, 2026, to discuss trade relations between Quebec and the United States. The me...

item.title: Federal High Court says ex-minister no be necessary party in election forgery case against INEC
item.description: Federal High Court for Abuja don refuse application by former Minister of State for Labour, Nkeiruka Onyejeocha, wey wan join ongoing suit about alleged forgery of election results from the 2023 Natio...

item.title: Taylor Swift seeks trademark protection for her voice and image against AI-generated content
item.description: Pop superstar Taylor Swift has filed trademark applications for two short audio clips and one image of herself as part of her effort to protect her identity from AI-generated deepfakes. The filings, s...

item.title: Low Strait of Hormuz Traffic Disrupts Gulf Trade and Oil Flows
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US and Iran has drastically reduced traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway for global oil transport. Normally, around 140 ships pass daily, but rece...

item.title: Pirates retain top spot despite Soweto derby draw against Chiefs
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou expressed relief after their title rivals, Mamelodi Sundowns, were held to a goalless draw by Richards Bay on the same day that Pirates drew 1-1 with Kaizer Chie...

item.title: Strong market optimism persists despite emerging risks to the equity rally
item.description: Major Wall Street strategists are continuing to urge investors to buy into equity markets, reinforcing a broadly optimistic outlook driven by strong corporate earnings and the accelerating influence o...

item.title: Melbourne Football Club and CEO Paul Guerra mutually agree to part ways
item.description: Melbourne Football Club has announced that it will be parting ways with chief executive Paul Guerra, just seven months after he officially took on the role. Guerra was appointed in April 2025 and bega...

item.title: Animal rights groups question McLaren Circus permits amid city approval
item.description: The McLaren Circus, currently stationed in Milnerton for its annual tour, is facing criticism from animal rights organisations over the use of wild animals in captivity. Beauty Without Cruelty (BWC) h...

item.title: Migori County Launches KSh 110,000 Cash Transfer to Expectant Mothers to Cut Maternal Deaths
item.description: Migori County in Kenya has for long struggled with high maternal mortality rates due to home births, poverty and lack of access to proper healthcare. Things are now changing thanks to a new initiative...
